calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. There being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Judge: CURTIS KARNOW; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2019 Continued To Jun-18-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jun-18-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: NEWTON LAM; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
